net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model

Enum ObjectOption

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Enum<ObjectOption>
      • net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.ObjectOption
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Comparable<ObjectOption>, org.eclipse.emf.common.util.Enumerator

    public enum ObjectOption
extends java.lang.Enum<ObjectOption>
implements org.eclipse.emf.common.util.Enumerator
    A representation of the literals of the enumeration 'Object Option', and utility methods for working with them.
    See Also:
    CabinPackage.getObjectOption()

      • VALUES

    • Method Detail

      • values

        public static ObjectOption[] values()
        Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared. This method may be used to iterate over the constants as follows: 
        for (ObjectOption c : ObjectOption.values())
    System.out.println(c);
        Returns:
        an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared

      • valueOf

        public static ObjectOption valueOf(java.lang.String name)
        Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this type. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
        Parameters:
        name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
        Returns:
        the enum constant with the specified name
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if this enum type has no constant with the specified name
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if the argument is null

        Returns the 'Object Option' literal with the specified literal value.
